safe_read_only_coverage_gaps.reason: The intake fixture includes a home surface observation only; a later attended session must decide whether a redacted permit detail category can be observed without exposing private values.
The release gate keeps fee workflows disabled, so this packet records only a read-only coverage gap for reviewer planning.

manual_handoff_notes.note: Any future attended session requires the human operator to open DevHub, authenticate manually, remain present, and stop before recording private values or official-control outcomes.
The release gate still carries an open DevHub pilot result intake readiness blocker, so this reconciliation packet cannot promote live capability readiness.

abort_reasons.trigger: Abort on automated login, credential handling, MFA automation, CAPTCHA automation, account creation, private field value exposure, or browser artifact storage.
abort_reasons.operator_response: Stop the pilot review and record only a redacted refused-action metadata note.

abort_reasons.trigger: Abort on upload, submit, certify, payment, schedule, cancel, or any other official action request.
abort_reasons.operator_response: Do not use DevHub controls; carry the issue as a manual handoff prerequisite.

next_attended_session_prerequisites.acceptance_criteria: Reviewer confirms the operator checklist, intake packet, and release gate status still require redacted metadata only.

next_attended_session_prerequisites.required_before: Any attempt to observe additional read-only surface categories
next_attended_session_prerequisites.acceptance_criteria: Reviewer approves a narrow list of allowed redacted surface categories and abort conditions for the attended operator.
